title: Image qurilmayapti
story: CI quvuri qizarib turibdi: image build bo'lmayapti.
Kod joyida, Dockerfile ham bor ko'rinishda. Build xatosini
symptom: cd ~/devops/sims/.lab/docker-broken-build/app && docker build -t simfix-build .   →   'failed to compute cache key / not found'
goal: Build muvaffaqiyatli o'tsin va konteyner 'BUILD-OK' chiqarsin (check buni o'zi tekshiradi).
check: cd "$SIM/app" && docker build -q -t simfix-build . >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker run --rm simfix-build | grep -q 'BUILD-OK'
hints: Build xatosi QAYSI qadamda (step) yiqilganini ko'rsatadi — o'sha COPY qatorini diqqat bilan o'qi.
COPY app,py .  — 'app,py' degan fayl bormi papkada? ls bilan solishtir.
Vergulni nuqtaga tuzat (app.py), keyin yana:  docker build -t simfix-build .
solution: Dockerfile'da COPY app,py — vergul-typo: bunday fayl yo'q, build 'not found' bilan yiqiladi. Docker xatosi har doim qaysi STEP'da singanini aytadi — o'sha qatorni fayl tizimi bilan solishtirish kifoya. CI'dagi build-fail'larning kattagina qismi shunaqa 1-belgilik typo bo'ladi (Day-16).
